name: Aichi Corporation
summary: Aichi Corporation manufactures and sells mechanized vehicles for electric utilities, telecommunications, construction, cargo handling, shipbuilding, and rail industries in Japan, Europe, North America, South America, Australia, and Southeast Asia. Its products include aerial work platforms and digger derricks; vehicles for the electric utilities, telecommunications, construction, shipbuilding, and rail industries; and other specialized vehicles. The company was formerly known as Aichi Sharyo Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Aichi Corporation in 1992. Aichi Corporation was incorporated in 1943 and is headquartered in Ageo, Japan. Aichi Corporation is a subsidiary of Toyota Industries Corporation.
